name: portscope
description: Local secure web GUI for running authorized, limited Nmap scans.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n worker,scanner,client -c blue,green,magenta "npm:dev:worker" "npm:dev:scanner" "npm:dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @portscope/scanner-agent && npm run build --workspace @portscope/worker-api && npm run build --workspace @portscope/client
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace @portscope/shared && npm run test --workspace @portscope/scanner-agent && npm run test --workspace @portscope/worker-api
